title: Event payload — claim
description: Payload schema for event.payload-subtype = 'claim' per D10. Closes D34 finding 5.2 — D10 prose says framework-core validates the five core subtypes' payload shapes; this schema delivers the validation. Notation: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 per D28.

confidence.description: Optional confidence designator. Vocabulary is shape-policy or extension-defined (e.g., 'high', 'medium', 'low', 'defensibility-grade'); core does not enumerate.

evidence-references.description: Optional references to evidence supporting the assertion. Items are opaque strings (URIs, file paths, qualified ids; framework does not validate semantics).
